title: Release bee 0.1.35 — shim-retire: bee.mjs is the only shipped CLI
action: Standing release flow: bump BEE_VERSION in templates/lib/state.mjs + version in .claude-plugin/plugin.json + .codex-plugin/plugin.json to 0.1.35; self-onboard with --apply --repo-hooks (recheck up_to_date); full verify green; commit 'release: bee 0.1.35 — shim-retire...', annotated tag v0.1.35, push origin main --tags; then onboard each anphabe host except anphabe-crm plus airemote with the REPO's own onboard script, confirm each reports 0.1.35 and zero bee_*.mjs left in host .bee/bin, pathspec-scoped host commits (.gitignore .bee AGENTS.md .claude CLAUDE.md .agents); pushes of host repos stay with the owner.

truths: all three version fields read 0.1.35 and stay in sync
every onboarded host reports 0.1.35 with no bee_*.mjs left in its .bee/bin
artifacts: per-host onboard results in the done report
prohibitions: never bare git commit in a host repo (pathspec only)

trace.verify_output: RELEASE-VERIFY=GREEN; test_lib 292 passed 0 failed; test_onboard PASS failures:0 skipped:1; BEE_VERSION=0.1.35; beegog pushed main+tag v0.1.35 (78bca0e..cd2e9e1); 9 hosts onboarded applied/up_to_date, all version=0.1.35, shims_left=0 each (a-blog f086513, bi-dashboard ffe9c5a, gogl 7bab50c, ctm 07f5fa7, haw a11cd95, hawcert 50eaa1d, scrape-jobs 9d0a64b, vnbptw a28d9fa, airemote 96ad40a); anphabe-crm excluded per standing rule; host pushes left to owner
